checkpoint_model.resume_rule: same thread_id resumes/reviews the same bounded stage lineage; new thread_id starts a new stage lineage

execution_modes.execute: validate work order and delegate only to a real cartridge executor when present

fail_closed_rules: no runner means no execution claim
non_goals: This contract adapter is not a general arbitrary stage executor.
purpose: Define the minimum executable contract for future mb run-stage execution without turning dry-run work orders into false execution claims.
